race.description: Hkjc World Pool Carbine Club Stakes (G3)
race.comment: AERODROME (4) took control early and showed a ton of grit with a well-deserved win over 1400m in the LR Canberra Guineas. Fresh for this and kept up to the mark with a recent 1200m trial at Randwick. Gets the right set-up and shapes as the value play in the race. RIVELLINO (1) comes back a few levels here after finishing off okay when fourth in a very strong G1 Randwick Guineas over this course and distance. Will go back early and look for him closing late. WEST OF SWINDON (2) has disappointed in three runs back and the stable will be looking for the blinkers to do the trick from the good gate. Maps well and no surprise to see him return to winning form. PROVIDENCE (5) is a talented colt who was no match when seventh behind Sheza Alibi in the Randwick Guineas. Group 2 placed in the Spring and since fitted with a 1030m trial. Worth thought. CROSSBOW (6) peaking at the right time and stays in the calculations from the wide barrier.
